name: Muhammad
title: THE FINAL MESSENGER
subtitle: Sent as a mercy to the worlds, the final Prophet received the Quran and established the path of perfect character and devotion to the One Creator.

name: Adam
subtitle: The first human and Prophet, created from clay and honored with divine knowledge in the Garden of Eden.

name: Idris
subtitle: The ancient Prophet known for his wisdom, truthfulness, and his mastery of writing and science.

name: Nuh
subtitle: The patient caller who built the Ark by divine command to save the believers from the Great Flood.

name: Hud
subtitle: Sent to the people of 'Ad, he called them to worship Allah alone and abandon their pride and idolatry.

name: Salih
subtitle: The Prophet sent to Thamud, whose miracle of the she-camel was a test for his people's faith.

name: Ibrahim
subtitle: The Friend of Allah, father of Prophets, and the one who rebuilt the Kaaba with his son Isma'il.

name: Lut
subtitle: The nephew of Ibrahim who was sent to guide his people away from immorality and towards righteousness.

name: Isma'il
subtitle: The son of Ibrahim who patiently submitted to Allah's command and helped build the Holy Kaaba.

name: Ishaq
subtitle: The second son of Ibrahim, a Prophet of great wisdom whose lineage produced many future Messengers.

name: Ya'qub
subtitle: Also known as Israel, he was a Prophet of immense patience and the father of the twelve tribes.

name: Yusuf
subtitle: The Prophet of beauty and patience, whose life journey from the well to the throne is the best of stories.

name: Ayyub
subtitle: The pinnacle of patience, who remained steadfast in his devotion through years of illness and loss.

name: Shu'ayb
subtitle: The orator of the Prophets, sent to Midian to call for justice in trade and worship of the One God.

name: Musa
subtitle: The one who spoke with Allah on Mount Sinai and led the Children of Israel out of Egyptian tyranny.

name: Harun
subtitle: The brother of Musa, known for his eloquence and his role as a supporter in the mission to Pharaoh.

name: Dhul-Kifl
subtitle: A Prophet of exceptional endurance and faithfulness, mentioned in the Quran as one of the steadfast.

name: Dawud
subtitle: The Prophet-King who was given the Zabur and blessed with a beautiful voice that made the mountains echo.

name: Sulayman
subtitle: The wise King and Prophet who was given power over the wind and the ability to speak to animals.

name: Ilyas
subtitle: A Prophet who called his people to abandon the worship of Ba'al and return to the worship of Allah.

name: Al-Yasa
subtitle: The successor to Ilyas, he continued the mission of guidance among the Children of Israel.

name: Yunus
subtitle: The companion of the whale, whose sincere repentance within the deep darkness brought divine salvation.

name: Zakariyya
subtitle: The guardian of Maryam and a Prophet of great faith who was blessed with a son, Yahya, in his old age.

name: Yahya
subtitle: A Prophet of wisdom and purity from childhood, who confirmed the word from Allah and prepared the way for Isa.

name: Isa
subtitle: The Messiah born of Maryam, who performed great miracles by Allah's leave and brought the Injeel.

name: Abu Bakr as-Siddiq
title: THE FIRST KHALIFA
subtitle: The closest companion of the Prophet, known for his unwavering truthfulness and sacrifice for Islam.

name: Umar ibn al-Khattab
title: AL-FAROOQ
subtitle: The second Khalifa, a leader of justice and strength who expanded the Islamic state with wisdom and humility.

name: Uthman ibn Affan
title: DHUN-NURAYN
subtitle: The third Khalifa, known for his extreme modesty, generosity, and the compilation of the Quran into its final form.

name: Ali ibn Abi Talib
title: ASADULLAH
subtitle: The fourth Khalifa, the gate to the city of knowledge, and a warrior of unparalleled bravery and spiritual depth.
